extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLITCH won a selective uphill sprint after teammate KELDERMAN crashed, forcing JUMBO-VISMA to chase back COFIDIS-MOVISTAR break on brutal circuit finale
tactical_patterns: KELDERMAN crash forced JUMBO-VISMA tactical reset; UAE/INEOS initially hesitated allowing COFIDIS/MOVISTAR break to gain dangerous margin mid-circuit
Late peloton fracturing benefited ROGLITCH positioned perfectly; VAN AERT working extensively gifted stage to leader after initial different plan
INEOS burned HART's teammates chasing rather than sitting; compromised final sprint positioning despite HART reaching podium second

rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: negative: concentration lapse crashing into WOODS eliminated key JUMBO domestique forcing team plan B on decisive circuit
rider_signals.ROGLITCH Primož: positive: third consecutive stage win shows peak form timing; superior energy management in selective sprint after teammates exhausted chasing
rider_signals.HART Tao Gegan: positive: second place despite INEOS being forced to chase suggests strong form but team tactics cost him stage victory
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: young rider doing disproportionate chase work for UAE yet still finishing podium suggests emerging domestique-GC hybrid capability
rider_signals.KÄMNA Lennard: negative: dropped significantly in GC rankings when race fractured; BORA couldn't protect him through circuit finale chaos
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: extensive work rate suggests original plan had him winning before KELDERMAN crash required gifting stage to ROGLITCH
